prompt_text:
### Demographics: 76-year-old Asian man

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 17 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes after hyperglycemia symptoms (polyuria, polydipsia, weight loss)
Current symptoms: Postprandial fatigue and thirst noted; no DKA/HHS signs; no recent hypoglycemia

### History
- Other conditions: MASH
Body mass index category: Normal
Osteoporosis (on bisphosphonate therapy)
Mild Cognitive Impairment with early Dementia
Recurrent Complicated Urinary Tract Infections
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 1 (90+); HF (No); ASCVD (No); MASLD: MASH; BMI Category: Normal
- Family history: No family history of type 2 diabetes (elicited)
- Social history: Current smoker (15 cigarettes/day for 15 years; ~11.2 pack-years); Alcohol 1-2 drinks/month

### Medication information
- Current medications: Metformin 1000mg twice daily; Atorvastatin (20 mg daily), Losartan (50 mg daily), Ciprofloxacin (500 mg twice daily for 7 days), Donepezil (10 mg nightly), Alendronate (70 mg weekly), Calcium Carbonate 500 Mg + Cholecalciferol 1000 Iu (daily)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 73.2 kg; Height 184.7 cm; BMI 21.4 kg/m²; Blood pressure 140/74 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 8.6%; 9 months ago 8.3%; 6 months ago 7.8%; 3 months ago 7.3%; current 5.7%), FPG (12 months ago 228mg/dL; 9 months ago 228mg/dL; 6 months ago 169mg/dL; 3 months ago 194mg/dL; current 105mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 71.2kg; 9 months ago 71.7kg; 6 months ago 74.7kg; 3 months ago 75.2kg; current 73.2kg), Height (12 months ago 184.7cm; 9 months ago 184.7cm; 6 months ago 184.7cm; 3 months ago 184.7cm; current 184.7cm), BMI (12 months ago 21.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 21.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 22.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 22.0kg/m²; current 21.4kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 138mmHg; 9 months ago 137mmHg; 6 months ago 135mmHg; 3 months ago 136mmHg; current 140mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 77mmHg; 9 months ago 76mmHg; 6 months ago 77mmHg; 3 months ago 74mmHg; current 74mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 102U/L; 9 months ago 109U/L; 6 months ago 104U/L; 3 months ago 109U/L; current 104U/L), AST (12 months ago 70U/L; 9 months ago 69U/L; 6 months ago 77U/L; 3 months ago 69U/L; current 71U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 1.1mg/dL; 9 months ago 1.1mg/dL; 6 months ago 1.1mg/dL; 3 months ago 1.1mg/dL; current 1.1mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 100mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 99mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 100mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 102mL/min/1.73m²; current 100mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 57mg/g; 9 months ago 74mg/g; 6 months ago 73mg/g; 3 months ago 51mg/g; current 74mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 86mg/dL; 9 months ago 84mg/dL; 6 months ago 84mg/dL; 3 months ago 79mg/dL; current 82mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 42mg/dL; 9 months ago 40mg/dL; 6 months ago 40mg/dL; 3 months ago 42mg/dL; current 41mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 183mg/dL; 9 months ago 179mg/dL; 6 months ago 162mg/dL; 3 months ago 162mg/dL; current 172mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 16.0g/dL; 9 months ago 16.0g/dL; 6 months ago 15.2g/dL; 3 months ago 15.9g/dL; current 15.2g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Not measured (Current); fasting C-peptide 0.83 ng/mL (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Excellent adherence (estimated ≥90%); SMBG 4-5 times/week; diet/exercise well controlled.
Financial context: Patient has limited financial resources and prefers low-cost options (budget ≤ KRW 200,000/month).
